layout_and_spacing.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid tight cramming.
layout_and_spacing.landing_page: Asymmetrical 'Bento' grid. Mode A Tetris grid. Use gap-8 to gap-12.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard: Mode B 'Control Room' grid. Dense, cardless flat surfaces. 1px border. gap-6. max 8px border-radius.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text and data. Center only for hero emphasis.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-lg (8px) globally for components to maintain a mature, tactile feel.

components.cards: Flat, pure white (#FFFFFF) against off-white background (#F9F8F6). 1px border (#E5E2DA), NO shadow by default. On hover: subtle shadow-sm and -translate-y-[1px].

buttons.accent: bg-[#E06D53] text-white hover:bg-[#C95B42] transition-all rounded-lg (Use sparingly for 'Log Activity' or 'Offset Carbon')
buttons.outline: border border-[#1A2E20] text-[#1A2E20] hover:bg-[#1A2E20] hover:text-white transition-all rounded-lg

components.navigation: Crystal Glass style for landing page: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70. For dashboard: solid white sidebar or topnav with bottom border.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults but styled with ring-[#8BA888] and border-[#E5E2DA].

motion.hover: Subtle transform and color shift. transition-all duration-200 ease-out
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-up for bento grid items using Framer Motion.
motion.charts: Smooth drawing animations for carbon reduction trends (Recharts).

images.description: Tall pine trees reaching towards the sky.
images.instructions: Use with an overlay (e.g. bg-white/40 or gradient) so text remains readable. Perfect for landing page hero or auth screen split background.
Use as a subtle background pattern for 'AI Insights' or 'Gamification' bento cards to give a tactile, earthy feel. Lower opacity significantly (e.g., opacity-10).

images.description: a close up of a green leaf with drops of water on it
images.instructions: Use inside a bento grid card, perhaps for the 'Achievements' or 'Carbon Offset' section to break up text.

images.description: Young man in blue shirt outdoors.
images.instructions: Use for the user profile picture in the dashboard header and profile summary.

media.icons: Use lucide-react if already installed, focusing on earthy/modern themes (Leaf, Tree, Car, Zap for energy). If adding libraries, consider @phosphor-icons/react.

specific_functionalities.landing_auth: Split screen layout for Auth. Left side branding/hero image, right side clean white form. Avoid standard centering.
specific_functionalities.dashboard: Explainable AI aesthetic: Wireframe logic, visible grids, clear data story. Dashboard cards should feel like a 'Control Room' - dense but breathable.
specific_functionalities.carbon_calculator: Stepped or tabbed interface for transport, energy, food. Use icons and large clickable areas (cards) instead of standard radio buttons.
specific_functionalities.ai_insights: Highlight with the Sage/Moss accent color or the subtle sand texture to separate it from raw data. Give it a 'friendly copilot' vibe, not an all-knowing robot. Use 'Explainable AI' approach.
specific_functionalities.gamification: Streaks and Badges should use the Terracotta (#E06D53) accent. Make them feel tactile (maybe Neumorphism variant 3 just for the badges to make them pop).

testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='log-transport-button'.
